# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Shell command(s) to build the project')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Shell command(s) to test the project')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy command specified"', description: 'Shell command(s) to deploy the project')
        booleanParam(name: 'RUN_BUILD', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run build step')
        booleanParam(name: 'RUN_TEST', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run test step')
        booleanParam(name: 'RUN_DEPLOY', defaultValue: false, description: 'Run deploy step')
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.RUN_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    echo "Executing build command..."
                '''
                sh params.BUILD_COMMAND
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.RUN_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    echo "Executing test command..."
                '''
                sh params.TEST_COMMAND
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.RUN_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    echo "Executing deploy command..."
                '''
                sh params.DEPLOY_COMMAND
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo 'Pipeline execution completed.'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline succeeded.'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed.'
        }
    }
}
